final_verdict: PRIVATE BETA READY WITH SETUP LIMITATIONS

blockers.current_issue: Login API works, but previous UX could make 401 failures feel generic or hidden.
blockers.required_fix: Show Approved users only, map 401 to a useful message, and link to Request Access.
blockers.evidence: LoginPage now displays approved-user copy, explicit 401/403 handling, and /access link; frontend tests/build pass.

blockers.current_issue: Settings was dialog-only and did not work correctly as a routed dashboard destination.
blockers.required_fix: Create dedicated /dashboard/settings using existing settings internals without breaking SettingsDialog.
blockers.evidence: /dashboard/settings route exists, SettingsPanel is shared by SettingsPage and SettingsDialog, route fetch returned 200, frontend tests pass.

blockers.current_issue: Old dashboard packed build flow into monolithic ProjectList, making it hard to use and route.
blockers.required_fix: Create routed New Build page while preserving Projects.create and clarification/upgrade behavior.
blockers.evidence: NewBuildPage reuses Projects.create, Clarify.check/apply, upgrade confirmation, media options, and routes to /workspace/:projectId.

blockers.current_issue: Workspace was desktop-only and navigation still pointed to /app.
blockers.required_fix: Keep desktop multi-panel layout, add mobile/tablet tabs, and point back/new actions to dashboard routes.
blockers.evidence: Desktop layout remains; mobile tabs Chat/Preview/Timeline/Files/QA added; back action goes to /dashboard/projects and new build to /dashboard/new.

blockers.current_issue: Preview worked but iframe auth used the normal JWT query parameter.
blockers.required_fix: Keep preview working while replacing JWT query usage with short-lived scoped preview tokens.
blockers.evidence: POST /api/projects/{project_id}/preview-token added; LivePreview calls Projects.previewToken and uses preview_token only.

blockers.current_issue: Reported live truth says backend health, orchestration health, runtime health, agents, and preview generation work.
blockers.evidence: Full backend suite passes: 608 passed, 2 skipped. /api/capabilities/status remains source of truth.

blockers.current_issue: Full JWT was exposed in iframe/open-preview URL.
blockers.required_fix: Add short-lived scoped preview token endpoint and stop putting the normal auth JWT in iframe URL.
blockers.evidence: Projects.previewUrl no longer reads getToken; preview endpoint requires preview_token and rejects missing/invalid preview tokens.

blockers.current_issue: Dashboard was one overloaded ProjectList page.
blockers.required_fix: Split into DashboardHome, NewBuildPage, ProjectsPage, RepoWorkbenchPage, MediaPage, SettingsPage.
blockers.evidence: Routes exist and fetch 200 from production static build.

blockers.current_issue: Current sidebar UX was not acceptable and user requested cleaner top navigation.
blockers.required_fix: Replace with top nav and compact secondary/pill navigation.
blockers.evidence: DashboardShell uses horizontal top nav only; no full side rail.

blockers.current_issue: Workspace multi-panel layout did not fit mobile/tablet.
blockers.required_fix: Add mobile tabs for Chat, Preview, Timeline, Files, QA and avoid horizontal overflow.
blockers.evidence: Workspace has lg desktop layout plus lg:hidden tabbed mobile layout.

blockers.current_issue: Public and dashboard copy could imply GenX/Qwen/GitHub/media features were available when keys may be missing.
blockers.required_fix: Use /api/capabilities/status where practical and label missing providers honestly.
blockers.evidence: CapabilityStatus and SettingsPanel call System.capabilitiesStatus; public copy now states provider-backed actions require configured keys.

blockers.current_issue: Repo import was hidden inside old ProjectList tabs.
blockers.required_fix: Create a routed Repo Workbench top-nav destination.
blockers.evidence: /dashboard/repo exists with public/private GitHub PAT states and imports via Projects.fromRepo.

blockers.current_issue: Visual quality needed premium private-beta positioning.
blockers.required_fix: Redesign public pages and dashboard surfaces with command-center feel.
blockers.evidence: Landing, Features, Pipeline, and dashboard pages rebuilt with premium command-center layout.

blockers.current_issue: Animation dependency and lockfiles were inconsistent.
blockers.required_fix: Ensure frontend lockfiles support current package.json and build flow.
blockers.evidence: npm install --legacy-peer-deps repaired lockfiles; npm run build passes.

blockers.current_issue: Copy needed private-beta positioning and clearer unsupported-feature language.
blockers.required_fix: Rewrite public and login copy around private software factory, Request Access, and honest setup states.
blockers.evidence: Primary CTA is Request Access; Login says Approved users only; Features includes capability truth panel.

blockers.current_issue: Smoke tests targeted old monolithic dashboard and bash-only tests failed on Windows.
blockers.required_fix: Update frontend smoke assertions and make bash-only backend dry-run checks skip when bash is unavailable.
blockers.evidence: Frontend test passes; backend full suite passes with 2 bash environment skips.

blockers.current_issue: GENX_API_KEY, QWEN_API_KEY, GITHUB_PAT, BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY, and PIXABAY_API_KEY may be unconfigured.
blockers.required_fix: Show setup state honestly and require operators to configure keys before provider-backed features are available.
blockers.evidence: This is an operator setup limitation, not a code blocker. SettingsPage shows key status and clear/save actions.
